title: Governance Decision
description: Outcome of a governance check_governance call. Distinct from creative approval states (see creative-approval-status). 'conditions' is a flow-control value requiring the caller to re-call check_governance after adjusting parameters.

enumDescriptions.approved: Proceed as planned — the action is governance-approved
enumDescriptions.denied: Do not proceed — the action is blocked by governance policy
enumDescriptions.conditions: Approved if the caller accepts the listed conditions and re-calls check_governance with adjusted parameters

$comment: get-plan-audit-logs-response.json summary.statuses carries an additional 'human_reviewed' counter that is NOT a valid governance decision value — it is a supplementary count of checks that went through human review, not a check outcome. See get-plan-audit-logs-response.json summary.statuses for the full stats shape.
